items.title: The next phase of enterprise AI
items.author: openai.com
items.snippet:
OpenAI has made several major announcements in early 2026. On the model front, three new GPT-5 family models were released in March 2026: GPT-5.3 Instant for fast everyday tasks, GPT-5.4 Thinking for complex professional workflows, and GPT-5.4 Pro for the most demanding use cases. GPT-5.3-Codex was introduced in February 2026 and is now available in the Responses API, with Codex pay-as-you-go pricing for teams launching in April 2026.

On the business and enterprise side, OpenAI raised $122 bill

items.title: AI as a Scientific Collaborator — OpenAI (January 2026)
items.author: cdn.openai.com
items.snippet:
OpenAI has been actively publishing research in early 2026, with a strong focus on scientific acceleration and AI safety. Notable recent work includes early experiments with GPT-5 accelerating scientific discovery — such as deriving new results in theoretical physics and lowering the cost of cell-free protein synthesis. OpenAI also introduced Prism, a LaTeX-native research workspace powered by GPT-5.2, designed to help scientists write, collaborate, and reason in one place.

On the AI safety fro

items.title: OpenAI Models by OpenAI - Release Notes - March 2026 Latest Updates - Releasebot
items.author: releasebot.io
items.snippet: OpenAI has been on an aggressive model release cadence in early 2026. GPT-5.4 launched on March 5, 2026, in two variants — GPT-5.4 Thinking and GPT-5.4 Pro — featuring a 33% reduction in factual errors versus GPT-5.2, built-in computer use, improved deep research, and stronger agentic coding and workflow capabilities across professional tools like spreadsheets and presentations. On March 17, OpenAI followed with GPT-5.4 mini and GPT-5.4 nano: mini is available to free-tier ChatGPT users and appr

items.title: Latest AI Models April 2026: Rankings & Features
items.author: www.buildfastwithai.com
items.snippet:
OpenAI has been active on social media and in the news around April 14, 2026. Key announcements include the release of GPT-5.3 Instant Mini in ChatGPT, which replaces GPT-5 Instant Mini as the fallback model for users who hit rate limits. The new model offers more natural conversation, stronger writing, and improved contextual awareness. OpenAI also announced pay-as-you-go pricing for Codex-only seats in ChatGPT Business and Enterprise workspaces, and a $100/month Pro plan update.

On the model
